# Yard Dog Landscapes

> Family-owned landscaping and lawn care company serving Longview and East Texas since 2017. Rated 5.0 stars across 110+ Google reviews, fully insured, free quotes, and 24-hour availability. Call (903) 844-6877.

Yard Dog Landscapes is a residential and commercial landscaping company based in Longview, Texas. We provide lawn maintenance, landscape design and installation, hardscaping, retaining walls, drainage, sod, mulch, fertilization, seasonal cleanups, and Christmas light installation across Gregg, Harrison, Smith, Rusk, Panola, and Nacogdoches counties in East Texas.

## Services
- [Landscaping](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/landscaping)
- [Lawn Maintenance](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/lawn-maintenance)
- [Mulch Installation](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/mulch-installation)
- [Sod Installation](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/sod-installation)
- [Hardscaping](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/hardscaping)
- [Retaining Walls](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/retaining-walls)
- [Drainage & Grading](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/drainage)
- [Fertilization](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/fertilization)
- [Flower Bed Installation](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/flower-bed-installation)
- [Hedge Trimming](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/hedge-trimming)
- [Tree Planting](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/tree-planting)
- [Tree & Shrub Care](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/tree-shrub-care)
- [Leaf Removal](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/leaf-removal)
- [Christmas Light Installation](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/christmas-lights)

## Company
- [About Yard Dog Landscapes](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/about): Family-owned in Longview since 2017, owned by Miller Maines. Built on showing up, doing the work right, and giving customers more than they pay for.
- [Our Work](https://www.yarddoglandscapes.com/our-work): Photos of completed East Texas landscaping and hardscaping projects.

- Business name: Yard Dog Landscapes
- Founded: 2017 (family-owned)
- Owner: Miller Maines

- Rating: 5.0 stars, 110+ Google reviews
